title: TTS Engine Fallback Cascade Failure
essence: When primary TTS engine fails, fallback sequence breaks and no audio is generated
symptoms: No audio playback during chat responses
Error messages about TTS engine failures
repro_steps: Start a chat session with any persona
Send a message that triggers TTS generation
Observe console for TTS engine error logs
root_cause: TTS service tries Gemini Preview first, then falls back to OpenAI, but if both fail the error is swallowed and no audio buffer is returned
do_not_do: Silently swallow TTS errors without fallback
Return null audio buffer without error handling
guardrails: Always validate audio buffer before returning
Implement proper error propagation for TTS failures
Add client-side TTS error handling with user feedback
prevent_tests: Test TTS with invalid API keys
Verify fallback behavior with mock failures

evidence.notes: Critical for user experience - silent failures are confusing
